activities_projects.title: MNC Impact Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To examine the role of multinational companies in India.
steps: Select one multinational company operating in India.
Identify its products and investment in India.
Write two positive and two negative impacts.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze the impact of MNCs on the Indian economy.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check accuracy of information and balanced analysis.

activities_projects.title: Export-Import Comparison Table
activities_projects.objective: To compare India’s exports and imports.
steps: List five major exports and five imports of India.
Create a comparison table.
Write two observations about trade patterns.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand trade flow and patterns.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess correctness and clarity of observations.

activities_projects.title: Globalisation Before and After 1991
activities_projects.objective: To analyze economic changes after liberalisation.
steps: List key economic features before 1991.
List major reforms introduced after 1991.
Write a short comparison paragraph.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic reforms and their impact.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check completeness and accuracy of comparison.

activities_projects.title: Small Producers Case Study
activities_projects.objective: To examine the impact of globalisation on small producers.
steps: Read a case study of a small producer.
Identify challenges faced due to global competition.
Suggest two solutions for improvement.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze challenges faced by local businesses.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess understanding and practicality of suggestions.

activities_projects.title: WTO Role Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To understand the functions and impact of WTO.
steps: List three functions of WTO.
Explain how WTO influences trade rules.
Write one benefit and one criticism of WTO.

activities_projects.title: Foreign Investment Research Activity
activities_projects.objective: To identify sectors receiving foreign investment in India.
steps: List sectors attracting foreign investment.
Give one example of foreign company in each sector.
Explain how FDI supports growth.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of foreign direct investment.
activities_projects.evaluation: Evaluate relevance of examples and explanation.

activities_projects.title: Consumer Choice Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To analyze how globalisation affects consumer choices.
steps: Choose three products with both Indian and foreign brands.
Compare price and features.
Write a short conclusion on benefits to consumers.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand competition and consumer benefits.

activities_projects.title: Interconnection Flowchart
activities_projects.objective: To understand how countries are interconnected through trade.
steps: Select a product like a mobile phone.
Identify countries involved in its production.
Draw a flowchart showing global connections.

activities_projects.title: Impact of Globalisation Debate
activities_projects.objective: To evaluate positive and negative effects of globalisation.
steps: List advantages and disadvantages of globalisation.
Support each point with one example.
Summarize your viewpoint in 4–5 lines.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking on globalisation.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess balance of arguments and clarity of viewpoint.

activities_projects.title: Digital Globalisation Study
activities_projects.objective: To explore the role of technology in globalisation.
steps: Identify examples of digital globalisation (e-commerce, IT services).
Explain how technology connects countries.
Write two benefits for India.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand role of technology in global integration.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check relevance of examples and explanation.
